_meta: TODO: professional translation review required (Hausa). Placeholder strings retain {variable} tokens.
spam_call_warning: Gargadi: Wannan kira na iya zama spam (saƙon banza).
spam_sms_warning: Gargadi: Wannan SMS na iya zama spam (saƙon banza).
otp_fraud_warning: Kana karɓar OTP daga banki yayin da kake kan kira. Wannan na iya zama zamba. Kar ka raba lambar da kowa.
url_blocked: Mun toshe wannan rukunin yanar gizo don tsaron ka.
fraud_alert: An gano wani aiki mai ban tsoro a kan asusun ka.
send_with_care_prompt: Za mu rike wannan canja wuri na simma {duration}. Kana iya soke kowane lokaci.
return_to_sender_confirm: Tabbatar: Mu mayar da GHS {amount} zuwa {recipient}.
diky_step1: Mun ga aiki mai ban mamaki. Ka san mai karɓa, {recipient}?
diky_step2: Don Allah tabbatar: Kai ka ba da izini ga canja wurin GHS {amount}?
diky_step3: Tabbaci na ƙarshe. Aika I don a tura, ko A'A don a soke.
ask_me_first_prompt: Kai ka ba da izini ga wannan ma'amalar ta GHS {amount}?
passive_protection_enrolled: Layin ka yana ƙarƙashin tsaro. Aika STOP don ficewa.
transaction_held: Muna duban ma'amalar ku don tsaro.
block_confirmed: An toshe lambar {msisdn}. Aika UNBLOCK don a sake bude.
